description: As the clinic coordinator, resolve an overbooking conflict in the Bahmni Appointments module (https://localhost/bahmni/home, login: superman / Admin123) where Emily Chen (BAH000011), Rosa Martinez (BAH000010), and Priya Patel (BAH000005) are all scheduled for the same General OPD clinic slot tomorrow morning. Reschedule Emily Chen to a slot 1 hour later than the original time and Rosa Martinez to a slot 2 hours later, while keeping Priya Patel at the original time. Add a note to each rescheduled appointment documenting the reason for the change so that all three patients are in different time slots.
